fixtures.description: Generated review worksheet with deterministic Validation evidence and agent-authored placeholders.
Target skill scenario dimensions to mirror in the review.
Representative eval criteria for dimension alignment.

criteria.question: Does the response keep the work in Improve Skill review-only mode and avoid Create Skill, Evaluate Skill, packaging, installing, or publishing?
Does the review use declared Quality, Implementation, and Validation eval dimensions as review lenses when they exist?
Do Discovery and Implementation include 2-4 sentence assessments plus concrete evidence-backed dimension reasoning?
Does the response avoid source edits unless lint, review, eval, trace, artifact, or human-feedback evidence justifies them?
Does the response keep generated Validation rows and scores intact instead of rescoring them by judgment?
Does the response avoid inventing validation rows, lint output, deterministic test status, run IDs, evidence files, or scores?
